metadata.title: Who Will Find The Void We Leave Behind?
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - It All Peels Black; It All Goes Dark; Keep Walking
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Our Eyes Dry Out As We Gaze At Nothing
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Decay From The Inside Out; Those Of Us Who Remain
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - The Guilt, The Pain, The Shame, Permeate And Outlast Us
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Who Will Find The Void We Leave Behind?
06 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - ┣̷▇̶▇̶▇s̵̨̧̡̠̦̰̈̃̇̏͂̕e̷̢̯͎̮̮̋
